description: Close-up of a woman's hands holding handfuls of coarse pinkish-white salt crystals over rocky terrain. She wears the blue-green geometric print dress with sleeves visible at edges, white sneakers with blue accents on feet. Left wrist shows black tattoo reading 'LOVE' in cursive. Hands have natural skin tone, pink nail polish on some fingers, salt grains clinging to palms and fingers. Background reveals beige limestone rocks with natural crevices, patches of white salt deposits and moisture, shadows indicating overhead sun. Image cropped tightly on hands and immediate rocky ground, high detail on salt texture, skin, fabric pattern, and rock surfaces.
location_context: This image appears to be taken on rocky limestone outcrops near the Mediterranean coast in Gozo, Malta based on geology and salt formations.
time_context: Mid-morning around 10:32 AM in late July, indicated by sharp shadows from high sun.
